scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/web build
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/api dev
scripts.dev:api: corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/api dev
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain test && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/web test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @batalla-ias/web check
